subject: Kids and Thanksgiving
snippet: Mom, Maya asked if you would bring the berry cobbler again this year...
body:
Mom,

Maya asked if you would bring the berry cobbler again this year for Thanksgiving. Lucas has a school project on family recipes and wants your handwritten version if you can dig it out. We can talk when you have a minute.

Sarah

subject: Storefront setup on the laptop
snippet: I can drive up Saturday and get the shop pages started with you...
body:
Mom,

I can drive up Saturday and get the shop pages started with you on the laptop. It is not as hard as it sounds. We do a few drafts, save them, and you decide later if you want to publish. Nothing goes live until you say. Let me know a good Saturday.

Thomas

subject: Ride to Rapid City
snippet: Confirming I will pick you up early on the nineteenth for the eye visit...
body:
Lisa,

Confirming I will pick you up early on the nineteenth for the eye visit. Plan on me pulling into your drive around eight. Coffee at the diner on the way if the road is dry. Send a note when you have it on your calendar so I know we are lined up.

Elaine

subject: Baby quilt for Sioux Falls
snippet: My sister is expecting in December and the pale blue baby quilt caught my eye...
body:
Hi Lisa,

My sister is expecting in December and the pale blue baby quilt caught my eye on your quilting account. I would like to ship it to me in Sioux Falls before the end of the month if possible. Can you send the shipping quote when you have a minute so I know the total before I say yes.

Kaitlyn Reeves
1418 South Grange Avenue
Sioux Falls, SD 57105

subject: Dresden wall hanging shipment
snippet: I would like the Dresden wall hanging you have listed and I am up in Bismarck...
body:
Lisa,

I would like the Dresden wall hanging you have listed and I am up in Bismarck. Please price out the shipping and let me know a total. My mother-in-law's birthday is in three weeks and I would like to give her this piece.

Address:
Gene Karolewski
2207 Pheasant Ridge Drive
Bismarck, ND 58503

Thank you.

subject: Metformin refill window opening
snippet: Your Metformin one thousand milligram refill window opens on November tenth...
body:
Hello Lisa Hoffman,

Your Metformin one thousand milligram refill window opens on November tenth. Pickup is in person at the Valley Community Health Center pharmacy. Please plan a stop within the week the window is open so there is no gap in your daily supply.

Valley Clinic Pharmacy Autofill

subject: Emma's fabric
snippet: Emma has been working on the little runner all week...
body:
Lisa,

Emma has been working on the little runner all week. She wants to know if you have any extra cream backing left from the Log Cabin batch. If not, no rush, she can wait. Talk soon.

Linda

subject: Rosebud plans
snippet: The grounds people are letting vendors load in from seven that morning...
body:
Lisa,

Quick note before the weekend. The grounds people are letting vendors load in from seven that morning and the pair is back to fourteen and fifteen on the corner the way we had it last year. Booth fee is running around forty a booth this year based on what I heard at the summer meeting, I will get you the actual number soon. Bring the runners and the wall hangings and whatever small totes you have, we can split the table the same way we did.

Wilma

subject: Re: Rosebud plans
snippet: Thanks Wilma. I will pack accordingly. Send the actual fee when you have it...
body: Thanks Wilma. I will pack accordingly. Send the actual fee when you have it and I will settle up on the day. Corner pair works fine for me.\n\nLisa

subject: Re: Rosebud plans
snippet: Actual booth fee came back at thirty-five per booth, not the forty I had guessed...
body:
Lisa,

Heard back from the Rosebud fair grounds this morning. Actual booth fee came back at thirty-five per booth, not the forty I had guessed. So thirty-five is what we each owe for our own booth. I will collect at the booth on the day, cash is fine, check is fine. Load-in details I will confirm on the Collective chat this week, the grounds folks are still finalizing.

Wilma

subject: Queen for my daughter's wedding
snippet: Following up on the queen wedding gift in blues and creams for my daughter...
body:
Lisa,

Following up on the queen wedding gift in blues and creams for my daughter. The wedding is not until late next spring so there is no rush at all. She loves the softer blues, cream on cream where you can work it, and no sharp contrast. Please send an estimate when you have time to sit down with it. I am here in Winner and can drive over if we need to talk fabric in person.

Margaret Ansell

subject: Re: Queen for my daughter's wedding
snippet: Fifty percent at the start and the balance on completion works fine on my end...
body:
Lisa,

Fifty percent at the start and the balance on completion works fine on my end. Send the written estimate whenever you have it drawn up. I have Nathan's college move-in the next week or two so no hurry.

Margaret
